hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-900 leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 leading-tight
hierarchy.data_large: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold font-mono text-emerald-600 tracking-tight

surface.card: bg-white border-b border-r border-slate-200 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

button.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 font-bold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-300 hover:border-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 font-bold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider
button.accent: bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 font-bold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider

card.container: bg-white border-b border-r border-slate-200 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

table.header_cell: px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-600 text-left

input.text: w-full bg-white border border-slate-300 px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm text-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-slate-900
input.label: block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-700 mb-2

slider.thumb: h-4 w-4 bg-slate-900 border-2 border-white rounded-none cursor-pointer

micro_themes.grid_borders: Container uses border-collapse layout. Items have border-r border-b border-slate-200 to create a technical/exposed grid look.
micro_themes.glassmorphism: Used only for the sticky top navigation header (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200).

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Bold weight) for dense dashboard UI. Ensure icons have explicit text context or tooltips.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) with the Light Theme.
All cards, buttons, and inputs MUST have rounded-none (0px border radius) to maintain the brutalist/technical aesthetic.
The F-pattern layout should be used for the dashboard: KPI cards on top, charts below, lists/tables on the bottom or side.
Data heavy elements MUST use 'JetBrains Mono' font. Tickers, prices, hashrates, and ROI percentages must be displayed in monospace.
All components must be flat with solid borders. Apply the hover shadow effect explicitly as defined in the card component (4px solid shadow offset).
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, sliders, and tables, but override their border-radius to 0 and remove soft shadows.
Only show profitable rigs. Hardcode the logic or API filter to remove any rig with negative daily profit.
Every interactive element MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='profitability-slider', data-testid='rig-card-buy-btn').
Use Recharts for the profit breakdown chart. Ensure it uses the sharp colors defined in colors.chart.
